title: Beltway
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''beltway''' was a moving platform with seats.<ref name="HSATLL">''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''</ref>

==History==
A beltway was a form of transportation used in densely crowded locations on highly urbanized planets. It provided a safe alternative to [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] and [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]]. It was a slightly more upscale version of the standard [[slidewalk]], which moved standing pedestrian traffic.<ref name="HSATLL" /> A similar beltway existed on board [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyers]]. It was an octagonal shaft that ran from stern to prow, and had a tracked hauler at the top, which allowed it to move heavy equipment. The shaft was estimated to be large enough to fit two [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] side by side.<ref name="ELII:RS">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
